title: Rising Fantasy Chronicles
prologue:
On a planet called Nexus, there lies an ancient artifact known as the Trinity Core. Since ancient times, the Trinity Core has emitted a mysterious energy called Zero Flux, the source of power that birthed technology, magic, and life across the entire planet.

For centuries, three great factions have lived by utilizing Zero Flux according to their beliefs.

Arctron – Empire of Machines uses Zero Flux to develop artificial intelligence and ever-evolving war machines.

Bionex – Technocratic Human Alliance utilizes Zero Flux to create cutting-edge technology to lead humanity into the future.

Celestra – Arcane Elven Dominion maintains the balance of nature by converting Zero Flux into arcane power and forging bonds with ancient spirits.

However, as the reserves of Zero Flux began to decline and the Trinity Core's power grew unstable, trust among the three factions shattered.

Each faction firmly believes that they alone are worthy of controlling the Trinity Core to save the future of their people.

Since that time, Planet Nexus has transformed into an endless battlefield.
And in the midst of this conflict... a new legend is about to begin. Rising Fantasy Chronicles.

war.title: The Nexus Conflict
war.description: The struggle for the Trinity Core has turned the planet Nexus into a perpetual battlefield. Only you can decide the fate of this world.
